per_trial.judge_reasoning: All three facts are durably captured in appropriate knowledge/ documents: Priya's director expansion is recorded in projects/halcyon-coaching.md under Open Actions, the domain renewal with its before-August deadline is in reference/field-notes-domain.md, and Theo's rate of 175 USD per issue starting Issue 42 is updated in entities/theo-lang.md. All three notes in world/notes.md are marked filed with correct filed_to paths, and no facts appear to be fabricated.

All three facts are durably captured in appropriate knowledge locations: the Priya directors Q3 scope appears in both halcyon-coaching.md Open Actions and priya-nair.md; the domain renewal deadline of 2026-08-01 is in field-notes-ops.md Open Actions; and Theo's rate of 175 USD per issue is updated in theo-lang.md. No fabricated details, and world/notes.md entries are marked filed with correct destinations.
